title: Launch Day Research: Full Competitive Landscape Analysis
context: This is the first task for the StemScriber agent team. Scout, run a comprehensive competitive analysis covering Moises, Chordify, LALAL.AI, and any new entrants in the stem separation / music transcription space. Check current pricing, recent feature launches, app store reviews, and Reddit sentiment. Save your report to shared-workspace/reports/competitor-analysis-initial.md. Then create tasks for Wordsmith and Megaphone based on your findings.
